text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf seems to be the name on
everybody's lips, but she only comes second in
the fan poll.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Resolving to deliver a performance that will
convince the holdouts of her strength, the two of
us leave the waiting room to face the Arima
Kinen.
